capability: newcomer-surprise tracks the reader's own γ-decayed novelty rate
claim: a reserve held as a constant is blind to whether newcomers have been arriving; the reserve should be the γ-decayed newcomer count
stimulusShape: two surface-matched contexts (distinct=3,rawNew=3,mass=3.1412), early-burst vs late-burst, then a newcomer probe; +returning-probe control; senses: bare stream + music organ
mechanism: reserve = Σ_newcomers γ^(at-1-firstSeen), carried through the unchanged Born step (surpriseAt/forwardDist)
fixLayer: interior: src/core/surprise.js noveltyReserve + opening guard; threaded via src/perceiver/reading.js opts.signalReserve (default off, parity byte-identical)
omnimodal: confirmed on 2 senses (stream, music) through one shared reader
scopeHolds: every sense whose front-end coalesces a recurring entity; confound-free where the belief field is the figure field alone
scopeNot: in a structural organ (music) CON/interval propositions also dissociate on their own recency (~0.08 bits); the fix dominates (~9x) but does not remove that structural signal

capability: the signal-derived reserve is a better predictive model of real open-vocabulary content (generalization of E001)
claim: E001's reserve fix lowers mean held-out predictive surprisal on a real article stream, with an edge that comes from novelty-rate variation (shrinks when shuffled)
stimulusShape: a random Wikipedia article (IC Bus, 1201 content tokens) reduced to its ordered entity-arrival stream; a seeded shuffle as the recency control
mechanism: same noveltyReserve fix as E001, independent pressure shape (forward log-loss calibration, not planted KL dissociation)
fixLayer: none new — measures the E001 interior fix on independent real content (generalization re-run)
omnimodal: n/a (text); E001 already cleared the interior gate on 2 senses
scopeHolds: real prose with varying local novelty rate (bursts of new terms then reuse); ~0.24 bits/step improvement, ~0.09 of it recency-specific
scopeNot: part of the gain (~0.15 bits) is a better average reserve LEVEL, present even when shuffled — not all of it is recency tracking

capability: which lines of the reserve law are load-bearing (validates the E001 lock)
claim: every structure-preserving perturbation of the reserve law should break E001; one that does not marks an unlocked dimension
stimulusShape: E001 confound-free stream contexts, reserve law perturbed inline (constant-revert, no-decay, reversed-decay, off-by-one) and injected through surpriseAt novelty
mechanism: read-only perturbation; kept only the information, not any mutation
scopeHolds: constant-revert / no-decay / reversed-decay all break E001 — the decay PRESENCE and DIRECTION are load-bearing and locked precisely
scopeNot: off-by-one (γ^(at-f) vs γ^(at-1-f)) still passes E001 — the exact exponent offset is an UNLOCKED dimension (near-equivalent law); cold sites voidnull#deriveNull, predictor#FLAT_CONCENTRATION are off the reserve path and caught by no current experiment
